message:
fix: extract slice(0, 3) magic number in useCICDStats.ts (#8833)

Introduces `TOP_FAILURES_LIMIT = 3` and uses it in the
`topFailures.slice(0, TOP_FAILURES_LIMIT)` call instead of the inline
literal. Value is documented alongside the other tuning constants at the
top of the file.

Clears scanner-beads-qhg (blamed to #8764).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
